decision-tree.root-question: Eval set ≥500 AND num_strata ≥2 AND traffic distribution available AND daily budget fixed?

branch.when: eval_size < 500 OR num_strata == 1 OR traffic_data_missing == true
eval_size >= 500 AND num_strata >= 2 AND traffic_data_available == true
branch.question: Does a parent recipe exist AND max_abs_dshare < abs_share_threshold AND age_days < max_age_days?

branch.when: parent_recipe_exists == true AND max_abs_dshare < 0.10 AND age_days < 30
parent_recipe_exists == false OR max_abs_dshare >= 0.10 OR age_days >= 30
branch.question: Will computed quotas honour r1 (floor), r3 (head cap), r6 (sum==N_daily)?

branch.when: floor_ok == true AND head_cap_ok == true AND sum_ok == true
floor_ok == false OR head_cap_ok == false OR sum_ok == false

example.trace: eval=1800, strata=4, traffic_data=yes, parent=1.1.0 age=32d -> refresh path -> floor/cap/sum all OK -> run-the-checklist
